'''Chris Annakin''' (born 30 January 1991) is a former English professional [[rugby league]] player who played as a {{rlp|sr}} forward.

He has played for [[Wakefield Trinity]] in the [[Super League]], and spent time on loan from [[Wakefield Trinity|Wakefield]] at [[Workington Town]] in [[2011 Championship 1|Championship 1]], and [[Featherstone Rovers]], [[London Broncos]] and the [[Dewsbury Rams]] in the [[RFL Championship|Championship]].<ref>{{cite web|title= Chris Annakin|url= http://www.rugbyleagueproject.org/players/chris-annakin/summary.html|work= rugbyleagueproject.org|publisher= Shawn Dollin, Andrew Ferguson and Bill Bates|accessdate= 10 December 2013}}</ref>

==Background==
Annakin was born in [[Dewsbury]], West Yorkshire, England.

==Career==
He appears for the club sporadically,<ref name= "loverugbyleague">{{cite web|url= http://www.loverugbyleague.com/stats/players/Chris-Annakin|title= Chris Annakin Player Stats|publisher= loverugbyleague.com|accessdate= 28 May 2014}}</ref> enduring somewhat of a nightmare 2014 season, as in his 3rd appearance of the season, he was banned for 5 matches for a dangerous throw.<ref name= "bbc">{{cite news|url= https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/27602355|title= BBC Sport - Super League: Wakefield's Chris Annakin banned for five matches|work= BBC Sport|access-date= 28 May 2014}}</ref>
